reference: Dear patient, I suggest you take Myoril four milligrams twice a day with Tramadol and Pantoff D twice a day, along with Neurobion Forte once a day. You should also consider back physiotherapy, hot fomentation, and shortwave diathermy.
text: Dear patient, I suggest you take Myril 4mg twice a day with Tramadol and Pantof D twice a day, along with NeuroBion Forte once a day. You should also consider back physiotherapy, hot fomentation, and shortwave diathermy.
